title: Review Editable Demo and Clone implementation against the Amendment
objective: Independently review the seven implementation Assignments for Amendment compliance, path ownership, local-only safety, Feature Introduction separation, and blocking findings.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify source template immutability and absence of nested mutation leakage.
Verify Sandbox versioning, untrusted validation, persistence, memory fallback, Reset, and local-only boundaries.
Verify Clone uses the current validated snapshot and preserves every approved owner-only and excluded-data rule.
Verify 功能介紹 replay and 功能導覽 remain separate in state, copy, accessibility, tests, and behavior.
Verify all diffs remain within Assignment allowed paths and do not modify Rules, packages, dependencies, migrations, or production configuration.
Verify no Demo action writes Firebase, Storage, myTrips, or Offline Cache and technical Clone remains Emulator-only.
List blocking and non-blocking findings with evidence and permit QA only when no blocking finding remains.
